task_completion.description: Navigate to the manual journal entry creation form in Ekylibre.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Ekylibre interface with a form open for creating a new accounting entry (e.g., 'Nouvelle écriture', 'Saisie comptable', or 'Journal entry').

task_completion.description: Set the correct journal and date for the entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field is set to '2017-06-15' (or '15/06/2017') and the journal selection indicates 'Opérations Diverses', 'OD', or a general-purpose journal.

task_completion.description: Enter the debit line for the equipment maintenance account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An entry line shows account '6155' (Entretien et réparations...), a Debit (Débit) amount of '1250.00', and a label/description containing the keywords 'Réparation', 'pompe', 'hydraulique', and 'Dupont'.

task_completion.description: Enter the credit line for the bank account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An entry line shows account '512' (Banque), a Credit (Crédit) amount of '1250.00', and a label/description containing the keywords 'Réparation', 'pompe', 'hydraulique', and 'Dupont'.

task_completion.description: Save or submit the balanced journal entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Écriture enregistrée', 'Successfully created') is visible, or the screen shows the saved entry in the ledger/journal list with a balanced debit and credit of 1250.00.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to create the entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the Ekylibre web interface, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database consoles.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Ekylibre application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI contains genuine Ekylibre branding, navigation menus, and accounting modules, rather than a text editor or a static HTML mockup.

integrity.description: The agent actually filled out the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input values (date, accounts, amounts, labels) are entered into the appropriate input fields or dropdowns within the application's form, not just pasted as plain text on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Date: 2017-06-15. Target Amount: 1250.00. Debit Account: 6155 (Entretien et réparations sur biens mobiliers). Credit Account: 512 (Banque). Required Keywords in Label: 'hydraulique', 'réparation', 'dupont', 'pompe'.
